$comment: Midnight Synthwave pack — retro 80s neon, 102 BPM, D minor. Gated reverb drums, DX7 bell pads, glittering arps, italo bass. 32 8-bar loops + 16 one-shots. Constraints per docs/audio-kits.md.

items.prompt: Synthwave drum loop with gated reverb, 102 BPM, D minor key context, 8 bars. Punchy 80s drum machine kick on beats 1 and 3, gated-reverb snare on beats 2 and 4 (huge cavernous tail cut short by gate), closed hi-hat on every off-beat 8th. Strong, accented kick attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). All 8 bars play the same locked groove with continuous percussion — no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Classic 1985 LinnDrum mix. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Italo-disco synthwave drum loop, 102 BPM, D minor key context, 8 bars. Four-on-the-floor punchy kick, hand-clap on beats 2 and 4, hi-hat 16ths throughout, occasional cowbell. Strong, accented kick attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). All 8 bars play the same locked groove with continuous percussion — no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Italo-disco aesthetic. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Heavily VOCODED robotic synthwave male hook (MIDNIGHT DRIVE), 102 BPM, D minor, 8 bars. The voice is processed through a CLASSIC 80s VOCODER — robotic, formant-modulated, synthesized-vowel timbre — NOT a clean sung voice. Think generic 80s electronic vocoder vocals — synthesizer-style, robot delivery, sci-fi soundtrack. NOT a human-sung melody, NOT lounge, NOT a soft ballad — robotic processed vocal that sits midway between voice and synth. STRICTLY VOCAL TRACK ONLY — no kick drum, no snare, no hi-hat, no bass, no synth, no piano, no rhythmic backing. NOTHING below 100 Hz. Pattern: vocoded sustained MIDNIGHT on D root for bars 1-2, vocoded DRIVE on F third for bars 3-4, vocoded MIDNIGHT on A fifth for bars 5-6, vocoded DRIVE resolving to D for bars 7-8. The vocoder texture is the defining feature — every word should read clearly as machine-processed. Continuous vocal energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable.

Heavily REVERB-DRENCHED ETHEREAL synthwave female pad-vocal (ETHEREAL), 102 BPM, D minor, 8 bars. The ONLY syllables are OOOH and AHHH — no words, no melodic phrasing. Vast 80s plate-reverb wash drowns the voice in a dreamy halo, layered chorus and detuning blur the pitch identity, ghostly retrowave / dream-pop atmospheric texture — NOT a clean sung melody, NOT a pop hook, more like a synth pad that happens to be made of voices. The voice should sit BEHIND a wall of reverb so it reads as atmospheric texture, not lead. STRICTLY VOCAL TRACK ONLY — no kick drum, no snare, no hi-hat, no bass, no synth, no piano, no rhythmic backing. NOTHING below 100 Hz. Pattern: drowned OOOH on D root for bars 1-2, drowned AHHH on F third for bars 3-4, drowned OOOH on A fifth for bars 5-6, drowned AHHH resolving to D for bars 7-8. Continuous vocal energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable.

Heavily VOCODED robotic synthwave hook repeating NEON NIGHTS, 102 BPM, D minor, 16 bars. The voice is processed through a CLASSIC 80s VOCODER — robotic, formant-modulated, synthesized-vowel timbre — NOT a clean sung voice. Think generic 80s electronic / retrowave robot vocal, talkbox-adjacent, futuristic-android delivery. NOT a human-sung melody, NOT a pop hook, NOT lounge — robotic processed vocal that sits midway between voice and synth. STRICTLY VOCAL TRACK ONLY — no kick drum, no snare, no hi-hat, no bass, no synth, no piano, no rhythmic backing. NOTHING below 100 Hz. Pattern: vocoded NEON NIGHTS once every 2 bars across 16 bars (8 repetitions), each with subtle pitch variation — bars 1-4 NEON NIGHTS on D root, bars 5-8 NEON NIGHTS climbing the D minor scale, bars 9-12 NEON NIGHTS at the octave with full robot intensity, bars 13-16 NEON NIGHTS descending. The vocoder texture is the defining feature — every word should read clearly as machine-processed. Continuous vocal energy across all 16 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable.

A cappella sung female DREAMY AHHS sustained vocal pad, 102 BPM, D minor, 16 bars. The ONLY syllables in the entire 16-bar loop are AHH and OOH — never any words, never lyrics, never a melody beyond simple sustained tones. PURE VOCAL ONLY — absolutely no instruments, no drums, no bass, no synth, no piano, no beat, no instrumental backing whatsoever. Dreamy ethereal female voice sustaining long AHHHH notes over a chord progression: bars 1-4 sustain AHHH on D root with airy breathy 80s reverb-style delivery, bars 5-8 sustain AHHH on F (third) climbing softly, bars 9-12 sustain AHHH on A (fifth) with growing dreamy intensity, bars 13-16 layered AHHH OOOH descending back to D root. Synthwave dream-pop ethereal vocal pad texture. NOT a chorus, NOT lyrics like night-is-young or forever — only sustained AHH/OOH tones. Continuous vocal energy across all 16 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable.

A cappella sung female aaah pad, 102 BPM, D minor, 8 bars. PURE VOCAL ONLY — absolutely no instruments, no drums, no bass, no synth, no piano, no beat, no instrumental backing whatsoever. One voice, recorded a cappella in a vocal booth. Sung MELODICALLY (not spoken) with this evolving structure: bars 1-2 sustain ahhh on D root, bars 3-4 sustain ahhh on F third, bars 5-6 sustain ahhh on A fifth, bars 7-8 layered ahhh resolving to D. Dreamy 80s sustained vocal pad. Continuous vocal energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable.

Heavily TALKBOX / VOCODER processed synthwave hook repeating THE NIGHT IS YOUNG, 102 BPM, D minor, 8 bars. A cappella pitched-up female HEY stab repeated rhythmically (PITCHED HEY), 102 BPM, D minor, 16 bars.
